heading: Today
text: Becoming partly to mostly sunny. Highs from the upper 70s to mid 80s. Light north wind.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear. Chance of river valley fog developing before dawn. Lows in the upper 50s, to 60s. Calm wind.

heading: Sunday
text: Any early fog giving way to mostly sunny skies. Highs in the low to mid 80s. Light and variable wind.
